zh.Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Brittany,: 法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉波爾-德-萊
zh.Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne,: 法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉波爾-德-萊
zh.Quimper, Finistère, Brittany, France: 法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾培
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU於大約1020年出生在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉波爾-德-萊時，他的父親Count Morvan de Leon II32歲，母親Marie ou Salomé de COUEZOU31歲。他於1037年與Adelice DU QUEMENET-?結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1086年在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Brittany,: 法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉波爾-德-萊

zh-hans.Quimper, Finistère, Brittany, France: 法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾培
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU于大约1020年出生在法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉波爾-德-萊时，他的父亲Count Morvan de Leon II32岁，母亲Marie ou Salomé de COUEZOU31岁。他于1037年与Adelice DU QUEMENET-?结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1086年在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: LEON-DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Vito, Antonio, Rocco, Aldo, Sal, Carlo, Pasquale, Giovanni, Luigi, Carmela.
Italian (Leóne): from a personal name based on a nickname for a fierce or brave warrior, from leone ‘lion’ (from Latin leo, genitive leonis). Compare De Leone .

variants.name: De Leone
meanings: Italian: patronymic from the personal name   Leone  .

variants.name: Leombruno
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Oreste, Salvatore, Antonio, Carlo, Guerino.
Italian: from a personal name, a compound of   Leone   +   Bruno  .

variants.name: Leoni
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Orlando, Gino, Mario, Ricardo, Roberto, Alfredo, Armando, Carmine, Dante, Enrico, Francesca, Giovanni, Leno, Reno, Rocco, Romolo.  French Gaston, Luc, Serge.  Spanish Juan, Lourdes, Rodolfo.
Italian (Leóni): patronymic or plural form of Leone . This surname is also found in Corsica and southern France.

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

en.lifeSummary: When Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU was born about 1020, in Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Brittany, France, his father, Count Morvan de Leon II, was 32 and his mother, Marie ou Salomé de COUEZOU, was 31. He married Adelice DU QUEMENET-? in 1037. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1086, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU est né environ 1020, à Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne, France, son père, Count Morvan de Leon II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Marie ou Salomé de COUEZOU, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Adelice DU QUEMENET-? en 1037. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1086, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU um 1020 in Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count Morvan de Leon II 32 und seine Mutter Marie ou Salomé de COUEZOU 31. Er hat 1037 Adelice DU QUEMENET-? geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1086 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU è nato il circa 1020 nel Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Count Morvan de Leon II, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Marie ou Salomé de COUEZOU, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Adelice DU QUEMENET-? nel 1037. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1086, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOUが約1020年にフランスブレタグンフィニストeアサイント-プオル-デ-ルeオンで生まれた時，父Count Morvan de Leon IIは32歳，母Marie ou Salomé de COUEZOUは31歳であった。1037年にAdelice DU QUEMENET-?と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1086年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU(이)가 대략 1020년 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 세인트-포-데-e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count Morvan de Leon II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie ou Salomé de COUEZOU(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1037년 Adelice DU QUEMENET-?(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1086년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1020–about 1086: tany ho any amin'ny 1020–tany ho any amin'ny 1086

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Count Morvan de Leon II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Marie ou Salomé de COUEZOU, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelice DU QUEMENET-? em 1037. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1086, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU родился около 1020 г. в местности сеинт-пол-де-лeон, финистeр, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Count Morvan de Leon II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Marie ou Salomé de COUEZOU, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelice DU QUEMENET-? в 1037 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1086 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

sm.about 1020–about 1086: e tusa o le 1020–e tusa o le 1086

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU nació aproximadamente 1020, en Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Count Morvan de Leon II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Marie ou Salomé de COUEZOU, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Adelice DU QUEMENET-? en 1037. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1086, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
